data.stubGenerator:
read N:int
loop N
    write Print Each row
data.outputDescription:
Print [[N]] lines.

For each row [[i]] from {{1}} to [[N]], print the [[i]]-th uppercase letter of the alphabet repeated [[i]] times on both sides forming a double pyramid.

lastVersion.statementHTML:
Goal

Print a symmetric double pyramid pattern made of uppercase alphabet characters.
Input
An integer N.
Output
Print N lines.

For each row i from 1 to N, print the i-th uppercase letter of the alphabet repeated i times on both sides forming a double pyramid.
Constraints
1 ≤ N ≤ 26
Example
Input
4
Output
A      A
BB    BB
CCC  CCC
DDDDDDDD
